title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces Nature Communications Publication Highlighting Pre-Clinical Data for ALLO-329, a Next Generation Dual-Targeted CD19/CD70 Allogeneic CAR T for Autoimmune Diseases
text: Allogene published pre-clinical data for ALLO-329 in Nature Communications, a leading scientific journal. The publication highlighted the rationale and development of ALLO-329, a next-generation dual-targeted CD19/CD70 allogeneic CAR T product candidate designed for treatment of autoimmune diseases. The pre-clinical data demonstrated the potential of dual targeting CD19 and CD70 in addressing resistant autoimmune conditions while maintaining favorable tolerability profile. This publication represents important validation of Allogene's technology platform and strategic expansion into autoimmune indications.
